title: axprobe workspace config
description: The workspace file .axprobe/config.yaml — how to install/run the product under test, shared by every scenario in the same .axprobe/ directory. Authored once per target. Public, versioned interface.

box.description: The disposable environment and how to get the tool under test into it.

image.description: Container image for the box, e.g. ubuntu:24.04.

docker.description: Expose the host Docker daemon inside the box via /var/run/docker.sock. High privilege; use only when the tool under test normally runs Docker.

copy.description: Host files to copy into the box before setup, formatted as <host-path>:<box-path>. File mode is preserved.

setup.description: Commands to install the tool under test. A failing step aborts the run.

defaults.description: Repo/workspace-level operator defaults. Flags and environment variables override these; ~/.axprobe/config.yaml is the fallback below these.

driver_model.description: Default OpenRouter model id for the LLM driver when --driver-model and AXPROBE_DRIVER_MODEL are unset.

review_model.description: Default OpenRouter model id for axprobe review when --review-model and AXPROBE_REVIEW_MODEL are unset.

credentials.description: Credentials shared across scenarios. A scenario may add or override by name. See the scenario schema for the credential shape.
